name: Atlas Validator
description: Atom-rule case review console for the ATLAS Atom Rules model — multi-feature (Short Video + LIVE). Supports NSA, HHB, HRA verticals. Lets reviewers tag a pending case across 7 atom dimensions (C/S/P/R/E/M/X), retrieve precedents via dual-channel BM25 + atom-Jaccard similarity, build a case-review-payload v0.7 (claims baked in skill) routed to the nsa/hhb-atom-precedent-review skill, render the skill's reasoned verdict, and confirm & save reviewed cases to the Precedents table with decision override tracking for discrepancy analysis.
